summary: Tested SALE PRICE ribbon design on CollectionDetailPage.js. All design elements match requirements: red gradient background, 'SALE PRICE' label, WAS/NOW pricing, SAVE badge with amount and %, discount breakdown bar with Sale/Volume/Total percentages. Non-sale products correctly do NOT show the ribbon.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily added 'Sale' label, was_price=35.99, sale_active=true, trade_discount=10 to alabaster-60x60cm-polished for testing. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sale ribbon feature is fully working. Verified: 1) Red gradient background (linear-gradient from #ef4444 to #b91c1c), 2) 'SALE PRICE' text in top-left, 3) 'WAS £X.XX' strikethrough in faded white, 4) 'NOW £Y.YY' in large bold white, 5) White badge on right with 'SAVE £X.XX' in red and 'X% OFF' below, 6) Discount breakdown bar shows Sale % (yellow dot), Volume % (amber dot), Total % (green dot). Non-sale products correctly show only volume discount badges (green) without sale ribbon.

sale_ribbon_design: ✓ 'SALE PRICE' label in top-left with red-200 color
✓ White badge on right with 'SAVE £X.XX' in red-600 and 'X% OFF' below
discount_breakdown_bar: ✓ Sale % shown with yellow dot when explicit was_price exists
✓ Volume % shown with amber dot when tier discount is active
sale_label_logic: ✓ Products with 'Sale' label show ribbon when tier discount is active
✓ Products with explicit was_price show WAS price from was_price field
✓ Products without Sale label do NOT show sale ribbon
✓ Sale discount % calculated correctly: (was_price - current_price) / was_price
non_sale_products: ✓ Non-sale products show normal volume pricing
✓ Green 'Save X%' badge appears for volume discounts
✓ No red sale ribbon or WAS pricing shown

scenario_1_sale_label_only.setup: Product with labels=['Sale'] but no was_price
scenario_1_sale_label_only.result: Shows ribbon with WAS=base_price, NOW=tier_price, Volume discount only

scenario_2_sale_with_was_price.result: Shows ribbon with WAS=35.99, NOW=27.54, Sale: 19% + Volume: 5% = Total: 23%

scenario_3_non_sale_product.result: No sale ribbon shown, only green volume discount badge

notes: ShopProductDetail.js clearance ribbon not tested - no shop_products in database
Trade discount breakdown not tested - requires trade user session which was not persisted
Credit back breakdown not tested - requires trade user with credit_back_rate
